fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the service contract.

fields.name: Invoice Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the invoice period for the service contract.

fields.name: Max. Labor Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum unit price that can be set for a resource on lines for service orders associated with the service contract.

fields.name: Combine Invoices
fields.tooltip: Specifies you want to combine invoices for this service contract with invoices for other service contracts with the same bill-to customer.

fields.name: Prepaid
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this service contract is prepaid.

fields.name: Default Response Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default response time for the service contract created from this service contract template.

fields.name: Contract Lines on Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies you want contract lines to appear as text on the invoice.

fields.name: Default Service Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default service period for the items in the contract.

fields.name: Invoice after Service
fields.tooltip: Specifies you can only invoice the contract if you have posted a service order linked to the contract since you last invoiced the contract.

fields.name: Allow Unbalanced Amounts
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the contents of the Calcd. Annual Amount field are copied into the Annual Amount field in the service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Contract Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contract group code of the service contract.

fields.name: Service Order Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service order type assigned to service orders linked to this service contract.

fields.name: Automatic Credit Memos
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a credit memo is created when you remove a contract line from the service contract under certain conditions.

fields.name: Price Update Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price update period for this service contract.

fields.name: Price Inv. Increase Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies all billable prices for the project task, expressed in the local currency.

fields.name: Serv. Contract Acc. Gr. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code associated with the service contract account group.
